purpose: Synthetic release-health monitoring without observing real users

collectedFields.observedAt: UTC timestamp generated by the synthetic runner
collectedFields.httpStatusClass: Status class for the two public upstream dependencies
collectedFields.errorCodes: Finite non-sensitive diagnostic codes from reliability-objectives.json

forbiddenFields: route start, route end or route geometry
referrer, query string or user-agent string
fixedSyntheticInputs: Public, hard-coded Singapore test fixtures are used and are never derived from a person.

retention.incidentRecord: Only the finite fields listed above may be copied into the incident record
